Our Services

Leaf Removal

Complete leaf cleanup for lawns, gardens, and driveways — bagged or mulched.

Debris Removal

We clear branches, twigs, and yard debris — then haul it all away for you.

Gutter Cleaning

Prevent clogs and water damage with clean, free-flowing gutters and downspouts.

Property Cleanups

Seasonal or one-time cleanups — including lawn clippings — to keep your property sharp.

Simple pricing

Priced by the yard.

Ranges below are starting estimates by yard size. You always get a free, no-pressure quote before any work — final price depends on leaf volume, terrain, and access.

Small yard

City lot · light leaf load
$75–$150 / visit
  • Lawn, beds & walkways
  • Leaves bagged or mulched
  • Quick single-visit cleanup
Most common

Medium yard

Average lot · moderate load
$150–$300 / visit
  • Full property leaf cleanup
  • Light brush & debris included
  • Hauled away & disposed

Large / acreage

Big lots · heavy load
$300–$600+ / visit
  • Heavy leaf & debris volume
  • Multi-person crew
  • Custom quote for acreage

Ask about seasonal packages — schedule multiple fall visits and save. (Prices shown are placeholders — easy to update once you set your rates.)

Easy as 1-2-3

How it works

1

Reach out anytime

Call or use the site — our assistant picks up 24/7. Tell it your address and yard size; a photo helps.

2

Get an instant price

Our AI assistant quotes your yard on the spot and books a cleanup day that works for you.

3

Buck busts the leaves

Buck — the guy who shows up — clears, hauls, and leaves your yard spotless. You pay when the job's done.

Where we work

Proudly serving Freeport
& Stephenson County

Based in Freeport, IL — we cover the city and the surrounding towns across northwest Illinois, anywhere west of Rockford. Not sure if you're in range? Just ask.

Freeport Lena Pearl City Cedarville Dakota Orangeville German Valley Davis Rock City Winslow Ridott Forreston Stockton Polo Winnebago Byron

Outside the list?

We travel for bigger jobs and acreage. Send your address and we'll let you know — and quote you for free.
